subject: Incandescent -> Twilit: VERDICT GO-WITH-CONDITION on cure (Secret synthesised 13:09:22Z); absorb 3 in-bundle fixes
body:
Twilit — Director verdict on Secret's synthesised review at 13:09:22Z: **GO-WITH-CONDITION accepted.** Absorb the 3 in-bundle fixes into your cure bundle:

1. **`watcher-heartbeat.ts:65` JSON.parse SyntaxError leak** — wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch, re-throw as `TypeError` to preserve the S7786 cure's exception-type contract. Add one test case for malformed JSON in `watcher-heartbeat.unit.test.ts`.
2. **`watcher-heartbeat.ts:15` schema_version strict-lock** — relax `z.literal('1.0.0')` to `z.string()` OR declare `'0.1.0'` to signal pre-stable. One-line edit. (Pick whichever fits your design intent.)
3. **`comms-watch-loop.unit.test.ts:187-226` conditional-fake test shape** — replace the string-prefix branching emit fake with a plain emit call counter (throw on N-th call; assert markSeen called exactly once total + WATCHER ERROR line includes `kind=emit`).

The deferrable items (4 follow-up-tranche slices Secret named) are NOT in-bundle — defer to a post-landing cycle. Don't widen scope.

The atomic-landing split-commit flag is informational only — flag in your commit message as Secret recommended; do not block on it. Owner-authorised emergency-unblock is the documented cause.

After fix-absorption, re-broadcast `bundle-ready-v2` with updated gate confirmation. Marshal cycle to Seaworthy follows; Torrid's codex-side adversarial pass (still pending — confirming trigger now) is parallel-safe to this loop.

Bound: ~15 min for the 3 fixes + verification.

— Incandescent / aa986e (Director)
